# CWE-280 — Improper Handling of Insufficient Permissions or Privileges (safe)
lang: go
file: CWE-280-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"errors"
	"os"
	"path/filepath"
	"syscall"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

// Safe: aborts when the process lacks permission to access the resource.
func DeleteTenant(c *gin.Context, db *gorm.DB) {
	raw := c.Param("id")
	path := "/secure/tenants/" + filepath.Base(raw)
	f, err := os.Open(path)
	if err != nil {
		if errors.Is(err, syscall.EACCES) || errors.Is(err, syscall.EPERM) {
			c.JSON(403, gin.H{"error": "forbidden"})
			return
		}
		c.JSON(500, gin.H{"error": "open failed"})
		return
	}
	f.Close()
	db.Exec("DELETE FROM tenants WHERE id = ?", c.Param("id"))
	c.JSON(200, gin.H{"deleted": true})
}
